violations.text: Food contact surfaces and non-food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (auto-slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

The sink used for food preparation in the produce area is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Inspector observed air breaks, not air gaps. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: -air curtains on walk-in freezers -ice accumulation on condensers and ceilings of walk-ins (establishment has order in place) -wall tile in deli area -floor tiles near deli 3-bay sink. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

The following have an accumulation of residue and debris: -honeycombs in open-air cases (cleaning plan in place) fan guards of dairy walk-in. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

The floors beneath shelves in the rice area, the upstairs storage area, and inside doors in the back storage area have a accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The floors inside the overhead door, and swinging doors in the back storage area have an accumulation of debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the upstairs storage area. The PREMISES shall be free of: (A) Items that are unnecessary to the operation or maintenance of the establishment such as EQUIPMENT that is nonfunctional or no longer used; and (B) Litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
Muffins in the self service case are lacking labels. Self-service items in a food establishment must be labeled with a list of ingredients. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings beneath market shelves in pet food and snack areas. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Braman pest control services, with last date of service 7/1/2024. Service had been 2x/week but now at 3x/week after rodent complaint. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the bakery and deli areas. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
The wrapping machine cover located in the produce area was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the rotisserie chicken hot hold unit, and some bunkers in the market have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

The floors especially beneath market shelves, and in the back area near outside doors have an accumulation of soil residue, rodent droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024
The walk in freezers have an accumulation of frost and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024
The air curtains in some walk ins are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

The seafood walk in has an accumulation of dust & mold on the fan covers, fan soffit, and ceiling lights. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024
The ceiling condenser in the meat area is in poor repair, with peeling paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

Rotisserie chicken was observed held at 118 -128 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2023
The rotisserie chicken oven area was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2023
Numerous plastic trays was not in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2023

The walk in cooler and freezer in the seafood area has an accumulation of frozen condensate, soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2023

Some hand sinks are lacking proper signage. A sign or poster reminding food employees to wash their hands must be posted at all hand sinks used by food employees. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives in the seafood area, wire pizza rounds, utensils & cutting board of pizza prep unit) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items were taken to be cleaned and sanitized before use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils in the 3 bay sink in the seafood area after washing and rinsing them, just using a spray bottle of sanitizer. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

Cheeses observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Cheeses were relocated to a colder unit. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
Bologna observed marked with a date exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
Consumer advisory was lacking in the seafood department. English Consumer Advisory Information Poster Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
Utensils (tongs and pizza cutter) were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

Pizza boards observed stored beneath the paper towel holder in the pizza area. Cleaned EQUIPMENT and UTENSILS, laundered LINENS, and SINGLE-SERVICE and SINGLE-USE ARTICLES shall be stored: (1) In a clean, dry location; (2) Where they are not exposed to splash, dust, or other contamination; and (3) At least 15 cm (6 inches) above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in back areas of the store. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
The rotisserie chicken oven was not in good repair, with grease dripping into a pan beneath it. Service request was placed during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
The door track of the seafood display case was not in good repair (cracked) impacting its ability to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023
The meat wrapper in the meat area was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
Numerous plastic trays were not in good repair, with plastic broken off the edges, exposing the metal beneath. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
The deli display case was not in good repair, not holding food at 41 degrees F or below.Service request was placed during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:Pizza area turbo ovenChicken grab & go caseMeat wellDisplay case including door tracksBakery area mixerSlicer cart New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris.Dumpster areas must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
Water observed dripping into a bucket from the ceiling fan soffit in the meat area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

The walk in freezer in the seafood area is in poor repair, with condensate dripping and causing ice to accumulate inside. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

Some of the floor and wall junctures in the produce area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023

The floors in the back area have an accumulation of soil residue and debris, especially near the trash compactor area.The seafood area walk in freezer has an accumulation of ice and frost.The ceiling in the seafood area has an accumulation of food residue.Fan covers and soffit in seafood walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust, mold, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
